form.formComment: At the latest run won by 0.8 len at Sandown-Lakeside 2yo Hcp March 25 over 1400m in soft going defeating Prime Pattern with 59kg at $4.60. Before that 6th of 10 at Flemington in the G2 Vrc Sires' on March 7 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Grinzinger Heart carrying 57kg at $11. An inside barrier is a big advantage. Improving gelding ready for this trip and further.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. When well in the market at debut, came from midfield and won by 0.5 len at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn March 26 over 1300m defeating Demmo Dermy carrying 56kg at $4. Second-up 11th of 13 at this track in the G1 Sires Prod on April 4 over 1400m, slow going 17 len behind Campione D'italia with 56.5kg at $81. Held in high regard by the stable and worth another chance.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. When well in the market at debut, raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a nose at Gosford 2yo Mdn-Sw March 14 over 1100m in soft going defeating Pomelo Chamomile carrying 54kg at $5. Second-up 7th of 10 at Randwick Kensington 2yo C&G Osc on March 25 over 1100m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Under Focus with 55kg at $12. Looks tested in this field.
